name: YouTube Studio
description: Creator dashboard for managing YouTube channels, videos, analytics, monetization, comments and content settings.

years.notes: Q4 2024 brand refresh — red rounded hexagon (#FF0033) with concentric white inner hexagon outline and central white play triangle. Vectorized from the App Store CDN raster ('logo_youtube_studio_2024_q4_color'); same #FF0033 red as the parent YouTube 2024 mark.

notes: Single millésime. Parent is `google` (not `youtube`) because the meta schema permits only one parent level and `youtube` itself sets `parent: "google"`. YouTube Studio is grouped alongside YouTube under the Google product family. Earlier YouTube Studio marks (2015–2021 red gear / 2021–2024 first hexagon) skipped — no authoritative standalone vector source available per the fetcher (Wikimedia Commons hosts only the wordmark-with-2024-icon; Fandom mirrors block automated fetches). 2024 SVG is hand-drawn from clean geometric primitives (regular pointy-top hexagon, concentric outline ring, centered play triangle); not traced from the raster.
